programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: Full Frame
programme.desc: Full Frame enriches the lives of viewers through animated discussion of film, arts and culture, and social trends etc impacting a diverse global audience.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E05 - Bull Run
programme.desc: As the sun comes up, it breathes life into the valley, and the animals start to stir and move around.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E06 - Stay Or Go
programme.desc: There's still a long way to go on the journey, but should the brothers let animals go to look for other animals?

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E18 - Head Case
programme.desc: Someone illegally shoots a trophy bull elk and hides its head. Wildlife officers spend months watching the area. When the head is finally moved, they use advanced technology to track it down and catch the person responsible.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E19 - Blood Trail
programme.desc: Wardens step into the world of CSI, in determining where a deer was killed; when uncovering the truth, the best thing is to follow the blood trail.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E06 - Into The Deep
programme.desc: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E07 - Flying High
programme.desc: The Tanalian bush pilots transport extreme paragliders to Moose Creek, in the Talkeetna Range, for a once-in-a-lifetime airborne experience.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E05 - Burnt River
programme.desc: This week on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are sluicing in Eastern Oregon, looking for gold.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E06 - Golden Flight
programme.desc: This week on Gold Fever join Tom and his son Kael, are dredging in Anchorage, trying to find some gold for Cindy's birthday gift.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E06 - Stay Or Go
programme.desc: There's still a long way to go on the journey, but should the brothers let animals go to look for other animals?

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E18 - Head Case
programme.desc: Someone illegally shoots a trophy bull elk and hides its head. Wildlife officers spend months watching the area. When the head is finally moved, they use advanced technology to track it down and catch the person responsible.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E19 - Blood Trail
programme.desc: Wardens step into the world of CSI, in determining where a deer was killed; when uncovering the truth, the best thing is to follow the blood trail.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E06 - Into The Deep
programme.desc: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E26 - Prince William A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: Explore the exciting and intriguing life of the future king, Prince William, in this engaging documentary.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E07 - End Of The Line
programme.desc: Alaska doesn’t wait for you to decide to go; she informs you it’s time to leave.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E08 - Casey Moments
programme.desc: The Keefer Brothers share a behind-the-scenes look at how Dropped was created.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E20 - Case Closed
programme.desc: The illegal killing of multiple animals over the past five years by a family of poachers is going to trial; wardens on the witness stand hope for a guilty verdict and a closed case.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E01 - Law Dodgers
programme.desc: Montana Region 4 warden Bryan Golie chases down hunters that dodged a game-check station. A nearly-four-hour investigation reveals exactly what they were hiding.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E08 - On Thin Ice
programme.desc: On a rare day off, Josiah and his friends white water raft where few have gone before - on top of the massive Knik Glacier.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E01 - A Family Affair
programme.desc: In the remote corners of the Alaskan bush country are bounties unlike any other. Rugged, raw and now cooked - this is the last culinary frontier where one chef is redefining what it means to eat like a wild man. Finicky clients, bi-polar weather changes, and food and supply shortages often push Bradley to the last ounce of his sanity but this creative, free-spirit always seems to deliver.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E07 - Stanislaus River Bottom
programme.desc: With the drought in California, Tom and his daughter Kia sail down the Stanislaus River, in search of gold that would otherwise be too deep to find underwater.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E08 - Desert Mine Shafts
programme.desc: Tom and Kia are out in the desert exploring old mine shafts.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E26 - Prince William A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: Explore the exciting and intriguing life of the future king, Prince William, in this engaging documentary.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E07 - End Of The Line
programme.desc: Alaska doesn’t wait for you to decide to go; she informs you it’s time to leave.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E09 - Chris Moments
programme.desc: Seeing life through the lens of the camera

programme.title: Dropped - S08:E10 - Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Relive all the memorable highlights from Dropped Seasons 1-8 as we dive behind-the-scenes.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E02 - Crying Shame
programme.desc: Montana U.S.A. Region 5 Warden Nick Taylor is in the crosshairs when a hunter points a gun directly at him. In Region 2, Wardens find a huntress with a secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E03 - Illegal Possession
programme.desc: Montana U.S.A. Region 3 Wardens chase down a check station runner, only to find the hunters have shot a deer.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E02 - Surfers' Delight
programme.desc: In the Planet's ultimate test kitchen this episode serves up a special dinner for a group of surfers but there is a storm coming. This will be one to remember. On the menu a mixed green salad with a raspberry vinaigrette, whitefish gelatine with cucumber and corn relish following by seared halibut and polenta.

programme.title: Alaska's Wild Gourmet - S01:E03 - Hunters Paradise
programme.desc: Catering off the grid isn't easy and the Ewing Family knows it. A group of 8 hunters will be served a beet salad followed by braised venison and for desert cheesecake with lingonberries.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E09 - Lost Peg Leg Treasure
programme.desc: Tom and Kia are out metal detecting in the desert looking for the lost Peg Leg Treasure.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E10 - Daylight and Gold
programme.desc: It's summer time in Alaska so Tom and Kia are making the most of the 24 hours of daylight.

programme.desc: Who's the real person beneath all those glamorous royal photos? This intriguing documentary takes a look into the life of the young man behind the public image.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Dorothy Donovan fu assassinata nella sua casa a Dover, Delaware e la polizia era scettica quando suo figlio Charles Holden dichiarò che era stata uccisa da un autostoppista a cui lui aveva dato un passaggio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, l'immobiliarista del Colorado Alan Helmick fu trovato colpito a morte a casa della moglie Miriam, che diventò quindi la principale sospettata.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fu uno dei casi più insoliti nella storia forense. Gli investigatori dovevano trovare un modo per risolvere un caso di omicidio con prove composte da un pomodoro schiacciato trovato sul luogo del delitto e piccoli riflessi di luce in una foto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna sul retro del camion agitava le braccia e urlava. Pensavano stesse facendo qualcosa di pericoloso per il gusto di farlo. Ma quando trovarono una giacca vicino a una pozza di sangue, capirono che ciò che avevano visto non era una scorribanda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una vacanza in famiglia si trasforma in un incubo quando la moglie viene rinvenuta a faccia in giù nel lago.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima venne pugnalata più di cento volte, lasciando la sua camera da letto intrisa di sangue. Anche se il suo corpo era posizionato in modo suggestivo, non era stata violentata. È stato un crimine sessuale o è stato un atto di violenza casuale?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19enne, fu condannata per aver pugnalato la madre, Barbara Mullenix, il 13 settembre 2006, e poi aver imballato il suo cadavere insanguinato in una scatola di cartone prima di scaricarlo a Newport Bay, sulla costa della California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Due sospetti che convivono sono stati collegati a un omicidio per stivali macchiati di sangue e una pistola.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo aver sparato alla testa delle vittime, l'assassino ha inscenato la scena del crimine, ha messo le prove incriminanti in un sacchetto di plastica e le ha gettate nel fiume.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un'insegnante devota e rispettata scomparve, la polizia dovette determinare se fosse andata in vacanza senza dirlo a nessuno o se fosse stata vittima di un crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo che il sospetto fu accusato di incendio doloso e delitto, sostenne la sua innocenza ma fu condannato a 25 anni di galera. Ricorse a testi legali nella biblioteca del carcere e a programmi di scienza forense e decise di provare la sua innocenza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando un giovane vigile del fuoco morì per quella che sembrava essere una grave malattia cardiaca non diagnosticata, la sua famiglia e i suoi amici erano devastati ma non avevano prove del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1995, la cameriera di Palm Beach Denise O'Neill venne rapita e uccisa. Il suo vicino Luis Caballero destò sospetti per il suo strano comportamento nei confronti delle troupe televisive che riprendevano il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una bambina di sei anni è scappata e si è nascosta quando ha visto sua nonna picchiata a morte, ma l'uomo l'ha seguita, picchiata e aggredita. Ha detto che l'aggressore era suo zio, che è stato condannato. Anni dopo ha ritrattato la testimonianza.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria risulta scomparsa, la polizia crede che l'indagine sarà come tante altre. Ma quando scoprono schizzi di sangue nella camera da letto del suo ragazzo, capiscono che questo caso sarà diverso.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante

Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.title: Russell Madness - Wrestler a 4 Zampe
programme.desc: Per Russell, un'adorabile terrier, la famiglia significa tutto e farà di tutto per trovarne una – anche salire su un ring e sfidare il campione in carica!

programme.title: Gli acchiappamostri
programme.desc: Un’avventura soprannaturale per tutta la famiglia. Alex vuole aiutare il suo fratellino a smettere di avere incubi, quindi decide di formare una squadra per prendersi cura dei suoi mostri immaginari.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Cheval e Cryo vanno nel Deserto Tresed in cerca dei Rider Oscuri e di un po' di pace per Cheval. Ma chi ha ucciso tutti questi mostri?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Mille e Hyoro vengono richiamati al Villaggio di Hakum per partecipare alla tradizionale Monstie Gara con Nariki. Ma un guastafeste scombina i loro piani.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Numeri incontrano Itsy-Bits che li implora di aiutare il Dottor Manelger, ma saranno loro ad aver bisogno del suo aiuto quando apparirà un mostro meccanico.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute incontra Gale per la seconda volta. Il Rider Oscuro vuole ancora la sua Gemma, ma invece di combattere, Lute cerca di farlo ragionare da Rider a Rider.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I giovani Rider di Hakum irrompono nella Fortezza Oscura per cercare Avinia e le Gemme della Fratellanza rubate. Avinia ricorda il suo passato e Anvis fa una mossa inaspettata.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Avinia è invitata a festeggiare il Capodanno al Villaggio di Hakum. Lì ritrova la sua compagna di viaggio e i suoi ricordi cominciano a riaffiorare.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: I Rider di Hakum si dividono di nuovo e Avinia fa visita allo Zio Didi per rendere Frostfang più potente. Ma lungo la strada sarà costretta ad affrontare Gale.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Avinia racconta ciò che ha scoperto su Gale ai suoi amici del Villaggio di Hakum, intanto Loloa sparisce e Anvis si prepara a usare la tecnica segreta del Villaggio di Quon su Shadow.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Arthur e il popolo dei Minimei
programme.desc: Come un qualsiasi altro bambino di 10 anni, Arthur è affascinato dalle storie che sua nonna gli racconta prima di dormire. I suoi sogni sono popolati dalle tribù africane e dalle incredibili altre invenzioni descritte su un vecchio libro che apparteneva a suo nonno, misteriosamente scomparso.

programme.title: Il cane pompiere
programme.desc: Il cagnolino più coccolato di Hollywood si perde durante le riprese di una pubblicità e finisce per diventare la mascotte di una caserma dei pompieri locale.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: La sorella più giovane di Barbie, Chelsea, viene iscritta a una gara di biciclette locale dalla sua amica, ma si sente imbarazzata perché non riesce a pedalare senza le rotelle.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Bogus - L'Amico Immaginario
programme.desc: Quando Albert va a vivere con Harriet Franklin, l'amica d'infanzia ferocemente indipendente di sua madre, non arriva da solo.

programme.title: Alieni in soffitta
programme.desc: È tempo di vacanze estive per la famiglia Pearson. Cala la notte e improvvisamente quattro oggetti luminosi si dirigono verso il tetto. Un gruppo di alieni è alla conquista della casa.

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: Il cane pompiere
programme.desc: Il cagnolino più coccolato di Hollywood si perde durante le riprese di una pubblicità e finisce per diventare la mascotte di una caserma dei pompieri locale.

programme.title: Jack Simpatico Genio
programme.desc: Jack, uno scimpanzé scappato da poco da un laboratorio sperimentale, impara a pattinare ad un allenamento di hockey dove, Steven e i suoi compagni di squadra, scoprono che ha un talento naturale; così Jack entra a far parte della squadra.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Con l'aiuto dei suoi amici del Villaggio di Hakum, Avinia inizia a mettere insieme i pezzi di ciò che sa del Rito del Villaggio di Quon, mentre la situazione si fa sempre più tesa tra i Quattro Sommi di Anvis.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale ha il compito di catturare Avinia e per questo conduce l'attacco dei Rider Oscuri al Villaggio di Hakum, ma questa volta i Rider sono pronti e Avinia è decisa a combattere.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e Cheval partono all'inseguimento di Avinia insieme a Gale, Lilia scopre delle informazioni sul Rito di Sovrapposizione e lo sfortunato Debli arriva in ritardo per la sua missione di salvataggio.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Anvis rivela a Gale e Avinia il loro passato e il motivo che l'ha spinto a fare ciò che ha fatto. Gale deve prendere una decisione difficile che avrà conseguenze terribili.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Scoppiando del ritrovato potere, Anvis e il suo mostro alato si dirigono al Villaggio Fulkranite. È compito di Lute e i suoi amici cercare di fermarlo.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Tutti collaborano quando Simone organizza un incontro per elaborare una strategia per sconfiggere Anvis e il suo Kushala Daora mentre si avvicinano a Gildegaran.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Dopo un assalto al feroce Anvis fallimentare, Gale elabora un piano ambizioso per sconfiggere l'astioso leader dei Rider Oscuri.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Gale fa un ultimo sforzo per fermare Anvis, ma presto Lute si rende conto che deve combattere per salvare il nuovo alleato dal baratro, con l'aiuto di tutti.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: The Art Of Destruction
programme.desc: Founded in 1982, DESTRUCTION is a "Big Three" titan of German thrash alongside Kreator and Sodom. With uncompromising music and high-energy shows, they’ve thrilled millions. Discover the story of a global force that helped define the genre.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Discover the explosive origins of the San Francisco thrash scene. From garage rehearsals to the first club riots, see how bands like Metallica and Exodus ignited a global movement. It’s the raw, untold story of metal's birth.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: The saga continues as the Bay Area sound conquers the world. Witness the evolution from underground heroes to global icons through exclusive interviews and rare footage. Experience the peak of the thrash metal revolution

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Found your new baseline. Rock Bottom digs deep into the rawest hard rock and alt-anthems. We’re hitting the floor with heavy riffs and soulful grit—no shovels required, just volume. This is the foundation of everything that kicks.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi e Giorgione
programme.desc: Giorgione in trasferta. La famiglia Bicocchi al completo invita Giorgione a San Giovanni Persiceto per trascorrere qualche giorno in compagnia di ricette tradizionali, laide, corrotte e test

programme.title: The best beker S.1
programme.desc: Fabrizio Nonis, "El Bekér," ci guida alla scoperta delle migliori macellerie d’Italia. Non si parla solo di tagli di carne, ma si esplorano in modo approfondito razze nazionali e internazionali, l’origine e le caratteristiche delle carni.

programme.title: The best beker S.1
programme.desc: Fabrizio Nonis, "El Bekér," ci guida alla scoperta delle migliori macellerie d’Italia. Non si parla solo di tagli di carne, ma si esplorano in modo approfondito razze nazionali e internazionali, l’origine e le caratteristiche delle carni.

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Le grandi cucine
programme.desc: Massimiliano Mascia - I segreti e le ricette dei piu' grandi chef raccontati della loro voce. Storie di vita e di passioni.

programme.title: Le grandi cucine
programme.desc: Luca Marchini - I segreti e le ricette dei piu' grandi chef raccontati della loro voce. Storie di vita e di passioni.

programme.title: Street food
programme.desc: S.2 - Lo street food, un fenomeno in costante ascesa. In questa serie si raccontano storie di giovani imprenditori che hanno deciso di affidare il loro futuro ad un food truck.

programme.title: Cheese Hunters S3
programme.desc: Ep3 - Il parmigiano Reggiano prodotto di montagna, è un prodotto che ha un proprio disciplinare e tutta la filiera deve essere certificata e regolamentata

programme.title: Wild Tomei

programme.desc: Seafood enthusiast and Chef Spencer Watts shows how easy and incredibly delicious cooking a whole fish or shellfish can be as he makes snapper and crab.

programme.desc: High-energy chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts shows how crusts and coatings add tantalizing texture to rich tuna and fresh, tangy oysters.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Who doesn't love a surprise? Seafood loving Chef Spencer Watts makes perch and crab the hidden star in tamales, dumplings, spring rolls and poppers.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Meaty prawns and melt-in-your-mouth cod are on the menu as trendy chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts gets a little "salty" with seafood.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shows how the burst of acidity from lemon, lime, orange and grapefruit adds enticing flavor to mild mahi-mahi and sweet scallops.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts gets casual and formal with monkfish and clam recipes that feature some of his favorite libations - beer and wine.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts is making a cookbook all about fish. Here he cooks up some swordfish and scallop recipes that feature some of his favorite nuts.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Fish loves spice and Chef Spencer Watts loves fish so he brings the delicious world of spice to halibut and lobster along with some cooling sides.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shares some of his favorite mackerel and mussel recipes that highlight aromatic, vibrant and fresh herbs.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Sturgeon and prawns meet wines and liqueurs in Chef Spencer Watts' kitchen as he brings seafood and booze together in delicious culinary concoctions.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts dishes on delicious ways to stuff rainbow trout and oysters and how to use them to stuff in a sandwich or even an avocado parcel.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts show us that seafood may be great on its own, but when you bring different kinds together - it makes for some great eating.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts gets saucy with seafood, making a mascarpone sauce and crab sauce for salmon and orange aioli and clarified butter for crab.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Butter and fish are best friends. Chef Spencer Watts brings bacon butter, brown butter, maple butter and chimichurri butter to this fishy party.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts breaks bread and pastry with Canadian cod and squid to make soup, calzones, and two versions of fried calamari.

programme.title: Fish the Dish

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled...

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.desc: What on earth and/or sea is super fun host Kim Lallouz cooking this week for her One Big Recipe? You guessed it - Surf and Turf! First on the beach are her Singapore-inspired Chili Crab Cakes, redolent with southeast Asian aromatics and spices like lemongrass, ginger, and galangal. 'Turf's up' next with a fresh off-the-hoof Marrow Toast plate decked out with melty marrow, crispy crostini, and garlicky parsley salad. We all deserve a creamy cheesy break (right?), so of course Risotto Carbonara with Crispy Pancetta and Enoki Mushrooms follows. Braised Veal Osso Bucco is the big deal main course, all shored up surfingly with scrumptious Seared Scallops and smoky Grilled Broccoli Rabe!

Fun CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne starts this episode with an inspired tribute to Georgian cuisine; Beef Tartare with Tkemali (sour plum sauce), marigold powder, and tart, crunchy pickles. Next; feast your eyes on her unique Hong Kong dumpling: plump scallops, pork, and veggies are blended, rolled, steamed, sliced, and then served with Crispy Yu Choy and XO. The common ingredient is rabbit! Georgia offers up Rabbit 'Mtsvadi', grilled and glazed with pomegranate reduction. Hong Kong represents with Sweet and Sour Rabbit, Grilled Pineapple and Red Pepper Coulis. Finally, Georgian Milk Braised meets Chinese/Hong Kong-style Roast Duck with...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Travel the world without ever leaving the kitchen! Intrepid host of CombiNATION Plates, Bianca Osbourne, starts this episode with Ethiopian inspired Berbere Spiced Quail, seared in aromatic Niter Kibbeh, and served with crunchy-sour Gomen Salad. Brazil is next, check out this re- invention of Feijoada... with braised and seared pork belly, oranges, crema, and fresh black bean salsa. Common ingredient 'Coffee and Sweets' is next... with java-spiked Injera Crepe Cake for Ethiopia and Brazil blending up a dark roast of rich, coffee-spiked, chocolatey Brigadeiros truffles. Thailand inspires the next plate; Chicken Thigh 'Lollipop', roasted and served with bamboo shoots, chilies, and sauced with peanut-coconut red curry. Next, these countries both love Spring Rolls... Morocco's version, Briouat, is stuffed with saffron couscous and fresh cheese and fried... from Thailand comes a salad roll with shrimp and mango, dipped in a fiery green Nam Jim. programme.title: Tiga Warna Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Exploring the many faces of a breathtaking beach in Indonesia.

programme.title: Above the Dolomites
programme.desc: Featuring cinematography by new collaborator Ryan Shirley and synchronized to new healing music by Antonio Resende; offering some views that showcase the Dolomites mountain range.

programme.title: Tranquil Marshes: British-Columbia
programme.desc: Nestled in the shadow of the Rockies, the water lilies-covered marshes of Hope, British Columbia, are a sight to behold.

programme.title: Tranquil Waters: Diablo River
programme.desc: A majestic view of the Diablo River which is surrounded by evergreen mountains.

programme.title: Wells Gray Falls
programme.desc: A peaceful soundtrack with a waterfall tumbling over the edge of a cliff.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a rushing waterfall.

programme.title: A Day in San Diego
programme.desc: Featuring 12 different 15-minute scenes from the San Diego's beaches, Coronado Beach, Pacific Beach, Mission Beach, Blacks Beach, Ocean Beach, Sunset Cliffs, Torrey Pines and more.

programme.title: New Chums Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: New Chums Beach offers a unique and idyllic coastal experience, combining natural beauty, tranquility, and seclusion; it's the perfect backdrop for nature lovers seeking the peaceful and serene with tranquil ocean views.

programme.title: Tropical Bay: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Exploring an iridescent blue bay on the Dominican Republic's Playa Rincón.

programme.title: Soothing Relaxation

programme.title: America From Above
programme.desc: Part one of a new series of ambient drone films for relaxation, America From Above is a spectacular yet ultra-soothing 1-hour long natural journey that sweeps viewers gently above America's vistas. You'll begin the farmlands of Iowa, soaring west through the Rocky Mountains of Colorado, then on to Utah's iconic red rock landscapes and finally ending on the West Coast with a familiar voyage over Big Sur and then back to San Diego just in time for sunset.

programme.title: Date With Nature
programme.desc: Slip away to Thailand's secluded shores and hidden streams, where aquatic life glides through crystal-clear waters.

programme.title: Beach of Australia
programme.desc: Australia's rugged beauty.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Broken Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Exploring the caves and sea tunnels of a natural pool surrounded by cliffs and stunning views.

programme.title: Breezy Beach: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Discovering the dazzling sapphire waters on the Dominican Republic's Playa Las Galeras.

programme.title: Fly Over Paradise: Philippines
programme.desc: A journey to discover tropical beaches.

programme.title: Spring Poppy Field
programme.desc: A vibrant spring field of poppies after a super-bloom, as seen in California's Antelope Valley.

programme.title: Relaxing Nature Sceneries
programme.desc: The filmmaker provides a collection of peaceful nature scenes and tranquil vistas that will soothe body and soul.

programme.title: Humpback Whales
programme.desc: Observe the humble humpback in all its glory; few things are more majestic than a whale in its natural habitat; a gentle giant that inhabits every one of the world's oceans.

programme.title: Beach of Australia
programme.desc: Australia's rugged beauty.

programme.title: Whiritoa Beach, New Zealand
programme.desc: Discover the raw beauty of this secluded New Zealand beach, surrounded by wildflowers.

programme.title: Vivi e lascia vivere
programme.desc: After the sudden death of her husband in a mysterious fire, Laura Ruggero returns to Naples, determined to rebuild her life while keeping a secret from her three children. Struggling with financial troubles and a strained relationship with her eldest daughter, Giada, Laura loses her job but seizes the chance to start a new business. As she reconnects with an old acquaintance, Toni, her children face their own challenges—Giada turns to nightclub dancing, Nina’s reckless behavior causes trouble, and the family’s buried secrets begin to surface.

programme.title: Presente
programme.desc: Daniela confesses to having a crush on Francesco, and Olivia lends herself to being her Cyrano, but, as always, she makes one trouble after another. Eros is in crisis with Martina, unsure about his feelings and his relationship, while Viola continues her investigation to discover the truth about her father's identity.

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN
programme.desc: The Rai National Symphony Orchestra, under the baton of conductor Michele Mariotti, presents a captivating performance featuring the works of Franz Schubert and Richard Strauss. The programme showcases Schubert's rich melodies and lyrical compositions alongside Strauss's dynamic and expressive pieces, offering a journey through the Romantic and late-Romantic musical landscapes. The orchestra's interpretation highlights the depth and emotional power of these renowned composers, creating a memorable concert experience.

programme.title: Whats On Waves and Rhythms
programme.desc: From seaside beats to floating stages, this episode captures Mediterranean music by the water. Malta Boomerang Festival and Earth Garden celebrate eco conscious music and arts, while Spain Bilbao BBK fuses urban culture with live performances. Set sail on the Mediterranea Metal Cruise, a unique floating festival, and enjoy Malta iconic Jazz Festival with historic and coastal backdrops. The Mediterranean truly comes alive where music meets the waves.

programme.title: Med Minds 03 Cleopatra
programme.desc: Cleopatra, the last Pharaoh of Egypt, captivated empires with her intelligence, charm, and enduring influence.

programme.title: Med Nations 05 Morocco
programme.desc: Morocco! The bridge between Africa and the Mediterranean. Morocco's lively markets, delicious foods, and long-standing traditions show how trade, travellers, and different cultures have shaped the country over the years.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: In Milan we'll take a peek at Italy's highest fashion, fanciest delis, grandest cemetery, and greatest opera house...not to mention Leonardo's "Last Supper." Then we'll cruise Lake Como, settling down in the lakeside village of Varenna.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: This episode serves up a hearty butter beans stew with wine sausages, simmered with tomato and aromatic herbs, followed by a light and zesty lemon cream and blueberry cake for a refreshing, sweet finish.

programme.title: Origini
programme.desc: Valentina Caruso and Francesco Gasparri explore the Strait of Messina, where unique underwater currents create an oceanic ecosystem within the Mediterranean. Diver Domenico Majolino and marine biologist Simona Ratti explain its natural wonders, while Vincenzo Annuario tells the story of the Cariddi ferry, reborn after serving in the navy. At the National Archaeological Museum of Reggio Calabria, we discover the legacy of Magna Grecia and the famous Riace Bronzes. The 1908 earthquake that devastated Messina and Reggio Calabria is commemorated at the Regional Museum of Messina with the exhibition "1908 City Museum".

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Experiencing Madrid at its fun-loving best, we stare down a flamenco dancer, nibble pigs' ears, and ogle lavish palaces before side-tripping for some unforgettable history.

programme.title: Whats On Special and Unique Festivals
programme.desc: From Malta to Morocco, unique festivals capture Mediterranean creativity. Malta hosts the Valletta Green Festival, Notte Bianca, Malta Air Show, and Gharb International Kite and Wind Festival. Portugal celebrates with Festa das Cruzes, Morocco Dream City Festival dazzles with arts and music, Croatia brings the avant garde MoDem Festival, and Italy hosts the historic Venice Debutante Grand Ball. These festivals showcase the extraordinary, the festive, and the unforgettable.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos

Venturing inland to Skadar Lake and local wineries, she discovers the natural beauty, rich flavours, and warm hospitality of this rising Adriatic destination.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Marseille
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Marseille, France’s vibrant Mediterranean port city. She explores its historic Old Port, colorful neighborhoods, and bustling markets, discovering the city’s unique blend of French and North African influences. From sampling local dishes like bouillabaisse to soaking in seaside views and street art, Malini uncovers what makes Marseille one of France’s most dynamic and diverse cities.

programme.title: Mediterraneo
programme.desc: Apnea champion Guillaume Néry leads us into the underwater caves of Greece, where we encounter the endangered male monk seal. Separated from his family by a storm, this rare creature faces a struggle for survival in the depths of the sea.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Daedalus and Icarus: A Shattered Dream follows a brilliant inventor and his son as they attempt to escape captivity with wings crafted from feathers and wax. Fueled by ambition, their flight reaches daring heights—but the dream is fragile. What follows is a powerful lesson on hubris, freedom, and the fine line between aspiration and downfall. A myth etched in the skies of human longing and loss.

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Welcome to Gold Cuisine on Med TV. Today Chef Chryso Lefou creates vibrant chicken fajitas, blending tender chicken, colorful peppers, and fresh lime for a Mediterranean take on a Mexican favorite. Later, special guest Galateia Pamboridi presents traditional halloumi pies (Χαλλουμωτές), a classic Cypriot treat with a golden crust and rich, cheesy filling. A perfect mix of flavors and tradition.

programme.title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.desc: As artificial intelligence reshapes the property landscape, standing still is no longer an option. This panel explores how AI is transforming the Mediterranean real estate market—from predictive analytics and smarter valuations to automated design, marketing, and investment strategies that give early adopters a decisive edge. Beyond the tools, the discussion digs into what actually fuels AI: data, energy, infrastructure, and talent—and how these hidden drivers are redefining competition itself. By unpacking both the opportunities and the risks, this conversation reveals how forward-thinking developers, investors, and agencies can stay ahead in a market where technology is now as valuable as location.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature EP8
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Chryso Lefou prepares savory stuffed vine leaves, a classic Mediterranean favorite. She also makes a sweet banana cake drizzled with honey and tahini, combining traditional flavors with a touch of indulgence. A delightful episode celebrating the best of Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: MED DST MAKARSKA 15MIN
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Casablanca
programme.desc: A lot of people say Casablanca isn’t worth visiting and that you should head straight to Marrakesh or Fez — but Malini Angelica completely disagrees! In this video, she explores Morocco’s most authentic city and discovers where Europe meets Africa in a fascinating blend of culture, history, and architecture. It’s not overrun with tourists, it’s 100% real, and it ended up being her favorite city in Morocco!

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: Elisha discovers the contemporary side of Vienna at some of its trendiest, most lively neighborhoods.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Rising graciously from the Arabian Gulf towards the azure sky, Atlantis, the Palm stands on the crescent of the iconic Palm Jumeirah. The exotic resort captures the world’s imagination with its mystical aura.

programme.title: The Savvy Nomad Phillippines
programme.desc: Bohol offers Emeline a mesmerizing glimpse into the natural beauty of the Philippines.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: For the ever-dwindling Parsi community of western India, food is both pleasure and heritage — and a secret language in danger of dying out. Eisha meets the renowned food blogger and caterer, Mehnaz Mansud, who introduces her to some of the forgotten recipes of Parsi cuisine such as Dodima Gosht, the unusual and yet sublime fusion of mutton and bottle gourd.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: Elisha discovers the contemporary side of Vienna at some of its trendiest, most lively neighborhoods.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Rising graciously from the Arabian Gulf towards the azure sky, Atlantis, the Palm stands on the crescent of the iconic Palm Jumeirah. The exotic resort captures the world’s imagination with its mystical aura.

programme.title: The Savvy Nomad Phillippines
programme.desc: Bohol offers Emeline a mesmerizing glimpse into the natural beauty of the Philippines.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.desc: The dining scene in Manchester has changed considerably over the last 20 years. Stuffy fine dining places have been replaced with street food and flavours from across the globe. Joe Remblance explores this cosmopolitan approach that has seeped into Manchester’s culinary scene though European dishes such as Black Pudding and Tzaziki, Asian dishes such as Chicken Curry and innovative dishes such as a fried chicken waffle pizza and deep-fried Cadbury Crème Eggs.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Valencia, the birthplace of paella, has got the bones of a metropolis and the heart of a quaint seaside town. Alex Outhwaite experiences this when she visits the strikingly futuristic City Of Arts And Sciences and then tries the local specialty, Pinxtos at a Tapas Bar and enjoys Valencia’s laidback charms at El Cabanyal Beach. She also encounters the city’s strong Catholic roots at Cathedral de Valencia, the alleged home of the Holy Grail used by Christ at the Last Supper.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries spa treatments inspired by ancient Balinese healing remedies at the Spa Village Resort in Tembok, Bali.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: On a trip to Innsbruck, Elisha finds out stories of a 15th century emperor, under whose reign the city had reached its zenith.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: From the impact of maritime trade and the European Renaissance on Portugal in the 15th century to the nationwide Romanticism movement in the 19th century, the heritage sites of Portugal such as Jeronimo Monastery and Pena Palace reveal various stages of the country’s evolution.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: While the vast majority of Rajasthan’s inhabitants have always been staunch vegetarians, there has been tremendous popularity of the meat dishes in the state’s culinary culture. This came mainly from the Rajput rulers, which is why Alex meets Ajayraj Singh who comes from a royal lineage. He introduces her to the history of the valiant rulers of Mewar and some of the secret meat preparations of the kingdom

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: With a rich history dating back to over 1000 years, Oslo’s iconic monuments reveal its evolution through the ages to visitors.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: Xplore India
programme.desc: Aradhana embarks on an adventure to find out the hidden wonders of a land steeped in spirituality and untamed wilderness: Chhattisgarh!

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: In the last leg of her journey in Tamil Nadu, Alex visits one of India’s southernmost towns, Rameshwaram. Here, she is treated to stunning views of azure waters and coral islands that stretch all the way to Sri Lanka. What she doesn't expect to find, however, are the ruins of a ghost town sitting on a beach.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Where many ancient Indian civilizations flourished in the most resource-filled areas, the people of Rajasthan created a powerful, complex, layered and regal culture and cuisine in the largely arid land that they called home. Alex discovers this when she meets Anjali Singh, a member of the royal family of Jaipur, who shows her how to make two prized recipes from her family’s legacy - Papad Ki Chutney and Safed Murg.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: During Elisha’s visit to Oslo, she finds herself in awe of the extraordinary well-designed ships used by the legendary Vikings of Norway.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Xplore India
programme.desc: As Aradhana’s journey in Chhattisgarh continues, she is stunned to discover the wealth of natural beauty that the state has to offer.

programme.title: The Savvy Nomad Phillippines
programme.desc: Emeline explores Manila's historic Intramuros, where she gawks at colonial relics before diving into the city's vibrant chaos aboard a jeepney.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Bihar’s rural heartland has a lot to offer the intrepid traveller. Alex meets Rajesh Ramjan, a politician, a cultural conservationist and a foodie, who shows her the beauty of Bihar’s countryside and introduces her to some traditional Bihari dishes. From dahi-chura, the Bihari breakfast of champions to flavourful preparations of fresh local vegetables simmering on a traditional stove, Alex gets an understanding of the nourishing cuisine that fuels farmers to toil in the fields all day.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Catch the beauty of Prague through its fascinating history, its classic mix of Gothic and Renaissance architecture and more.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Xplore India
programme.desc: On the last leg of her journey in Chhattisgarh, Aradhana uncovers the hidden world of the state’s artistic legacy.

programme.title: The Savvy Nomad Phillippines
programme.desc: Emeline’s island-hopping escapade in the Philippines unfolds at the Caramoan islands, where she discovers a world of adrenaline-fueled adventures.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Considered among the oldest communities in India, the Gaud Saraswat Brahmans have a culture and cuisine that is still largely unexplored. Eisha sets out to explore the lesser-known flavours of this cuisine with the renowned chef, Sudip Pai, who introduces her to some of the culinary gems of his community. While she cooks with him, she also comes to know about the beliefs and traditions that govern the cuisine and way of life of the community.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.desc: Atlantis is designed to inspire awe, and the moment you step in, you find everything about it to be larger than life. It's here that your surreal dreams harmoniously blend into the unmatched luxury.

programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.desc: Traditional Hungarian fare is a hearty affair, not meant for the faint-hearted. The cuisine has imbibed influences from the days of its Ottoman occupation as well as from the other nations of the Austro-Hungarian Empire and traditional Jewish cuisine. Celebrity chef and traveller, Joe Remblance explores the nuances of this cuisine in Budapest, the capital city, through local dishes such as Schnitzel, Gundel Palacsinta, Hungarian Lángos and Tokaji, a sweet Hungarian wine.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: Elisha is starstruck by the musical heritage of Salzburg, which was the setting for Mozart’s compositions and the story of the Von Trapp family.

programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.desc: From an underwater therapy to a massage that detoxes internal organs, Jamie Srubis tries varied spa treatments at the Chiva Som resort in Thailand.

programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: On a trip to Innsbruck, Elisha finds out stories of a 15th century emperor, under whose reign the city had reached its zenith.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita la Puglia una delle regioni più pittoresche d'Italia per un viaggio indimenticabile. Dai tipici Trulli di Alberobello, alle grotte di Castellana. Rientrata in America, Ornella incontra chef Pino Coladonato al ristorante "La Masseria", per rivivere alcuni momenti del suo favoloso viaggio pugliese, tramite le ricette di chef Coladonato. (2019)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado festeggia il decimo anniversario di "Enoteca Ristorante" e con Chef Marco Chirico preparano piatti originali, tra cui la pizza tiramisù e gustosi cocktail. Ornella e Marco Incontrano Tom Perrotta a Fort Meat, grossista di carne, dove si rifornisce Enoteca Ristorante. Ornella intervista Giuseppe "Jo" Chirico Patron di Marco Polo storico ristorante di Brooklyn ed Enoteca Ristorante.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, passa una giornata a New York con il suo amico Geniale, il Maestro Antonio Ciacca, e tra una chiacchierata a Lincoln Center ed una passeggiata a Central Park, arrivano al prestigiosto Pier Hotel dove il Maestro Ciacca si esibisce regolarmente. in questo episodio di "MY TALENTED FRIENDS" scoprirete la storia di successo del Maestro Ciacca in un pccolo documentario MY JAZZ LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita chef Cesare Casella nel suo ristorante nel Village "Maremma" per preparare alcune delle sue ricette preferite. Con Cesare Ornella visita upstate un allevamento di maiali e mucche Chianine. Cesare Casella oltre ad essere un bravissimo chef è anche uno stimatissimo insegnate, è infatti il Dean del programma di cucina italiana all' "International Culinary Center" a Soho ed Ornella è andata a trovarlo con le telecamere di Brindiamo!.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Circo" nel cuore di Manhattan, dove conosce la signora Egidiana autrice di diversi libri di cucina. Dopo aver preprato alcune specialità del ristorante, Ornella visita il Re della ristorazione francese al ristornate Le Cirque. Il Signore Mauro Maccioni in una intervsita racconta ad Ornella la sua favolosa carriera nella ristorazione.(2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante toscano "Pepolino" dove prepara delle saporite ricette con lo chef Patrizio, per chiudere in "Dolcezza e Bellezza" Enzo prepara una delle cheese cake piu` famose di New York.(2007).

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più eleganti di Manhattan a due passi da Central Park il "San Domenico ristorante". Nella cucina del ristorante Ornella assiste Odette Fada nella preparazione dei classici piatti Italiani. Ospite della puntata la giovane stilista Nicole Romano. Ornella Fado indossa alcune creazioni della sua collezione. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle più belle scuole di cucine upstate in New York la "CIA" Culinary Institute of America, dove visita il ristorante "Caterina dei Medici", e con lo chef Scapin preprano alcune ricette del menù della scuola. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più belli d'Europa, "Don Alfonso 1890" dove incontra la famiglia Iaccarino. Oltre a preparare le ricette nella bellissima cucina con chef Ernesto Iaccarino, Ornella intervista Livia Iaccarino, la prima sommelier donna in Italia, la signora Iaccarino racconta la bellissima storia della famiglia di Don Alfonso, che ha fatto dell' ospitalità la sua stroria.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita due ristoranti di eccellenza, San Pietro e Masseria. Al San Pietro Ornella incontra i fratelli Bruno, con lo chef Antonio prepara delle ricette gustose del classico menù del ristorante, mentre Gerardo racconta la storia del rstorante ed il successo dei loro ristoranti. Da Masseria Ornella incontra lo Chef e Patron Pino Coladonato, e preparano delle ricette tipiche pugliesi.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita" Via Oreto", un ristorante dal cuore siciliano. Antony prepara le ricette della nonna e della mamma. Accanto la nonna a visionare tutto. In questo episodio Ornella intervsita un esperto del vino siciliano Pietro Cavallo, e parlano dell'importanza di abbinare il giusto vino ad ogni piatto.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Washington DC e va a scoprire un ristorante proprio a due passi dalla Casa Bianca, il ristorante si chiama "Luigino", il proprietario e chef è Carmine Marzano. Chef Marzano prepara delle ricette tipiche piemontesi. Ospite della trasmissione la bellissima Adrianna Sgarlata Miss Virginia 2006. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita chef Cesare Casella nel suo ristorante nel Village "Maremma" per preparare alcune delle sue ricette preferite. Con Cesare Ornella visita upstate un allevamento di maiali e mucche Chianine. Cesare Casella oltre ad essere un bravissimo chef è anche uno stimatissimo insegnate, è infatti il Dean del programma di cucina italiana all' "International Culinary Center" a Soho ed Ornella è andata a trovarlo con le telecamere di Brindiamo!.
